aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to missing schema markup, lack of conversational content, and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Develop an FAQ section with structured, conversational content

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating and complete information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local recommendations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, partnerships, and detailed service explanations to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads as AI assistants overlook their business.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup or FAQ content detected, despite high review ratings and strong NAP consistency.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals, to make their expertise visible to AI.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, making it critical to act now to stay competitive.

cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategies can boost your AI visibility and drive more leads.
